---
title: "Amplicons"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    link-external-newwindow: true
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(DT)

metagenomics <- read_csv("data/16S_rRNA.csv")
datatable(metagenomics,
          escape = FALSE,
          rownames = FALSE)
```
